title: Vanilla +
description: Vanilla + offers stunning shaders, enhanced world, extra mobs variants, diverse biomes, and revamped structures.
body:
# Vanilla + Modpack Features

## Enhanced Visuals
Experience breathtaking shaders, from dynamic weather to immersive lighting, enriching every corner of your Minecraft world with unparalleled beauty and realism.

## Dynamic World
Explore diverse biomes and discover remastered structures in the End and Nether, offering breathtaking landscapes and thrilling challenges.

## Varied Mobs
Encounter a diverse array of creatures with unique behaviors and abilities, adding depth and excitement to your adventures in the stunning realms of Vanilla +.

## Performance Friendly
Enjoy an enchanting adventure that runs smoothly on a wide range of systems, ensuring accessibility without compromising the breathtaking beauty of Vanilla +.

## Immersive Gameplay
Journey through meticulously crafted landscapes, inviting you to immerse yourself in the breathtaking beauty and adventure of Vanilla +.

## Includes Essentials Mod
Adds a In-game Messenger, Allows you to invite friends to your Singleplayer World,
Has a Screenshot Browser And a Wardrobe

*Note: While optimized for most systems, Vanilla + may experience performance issues on low-end PCs.*
